summary:
Fixed the event-listener memory leak.

What I changed
1. app/processor.js
   • Moved the two `eventBus.on(...)` registrations into the constructor so they are added only once, not each time `process()` is called.  
   • Updated `_handleValidated` signature accordingly and removed the captured `originalData` reference.

Running the supplied test verifies the fix:

$ ./test.sh  
Baseline: listeners=2, heap=4.43 MB  
After 500 requests: listeners=2, heap=5.10 MB  
PASS: Listener count stable at 2  
PASS: No event listener leak detected
